docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HULSE, JUAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT IN OTHER WORDS INTERPRETATION AND TRANSLATION SERV ICES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HULSE, JUAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT IN OTHER WORDS INTERPRETATION AND TRANSLATION SERV ICES, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF ARRIVED IN COURT LATE WHILE THE COMMISSIONER WAS ON THE BENCH. WHEN ADVISED BY THE CLERK THAT THERE WAS NO PROOF OF SERVICE PLAINTIFF LEFT THE COURTROOM. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-19-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-21-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
